Description: Goddess of the sea, storms, and strife. Represents anger and unpredictable change.
God of wrath and vengeance. Consort of Takhisis and patron of minotaurs.
Queen of Darkness, goddess of control and conquest. Former head of the evil pantheon, defeated and slain.
God of fatalism and undeath. Promotes surrender to fate and the creation of undead.
God of decay, disease, and suffering. Seeks to bring pain and suffering to the world.
God of exploitation and lies. Influences mortals to use others for personal gain.
God of evil magic, patron of black-robed wizards. Represents ambition and control over arcane power.
A goddess who served as Takhisis's champion. Now an independent deity following the War of Souls.
